main.description: Initiate a W Identity link for the authenticated unverified account. Returns a QR code URL and session token. The client polls io.trustanchor.quicklogin.status until status='completed', then uses the returned tokens to refresh its session.

sessionId.description: Session ID — pass to io.trustanchor.quicklogin.status to poll.

sessionToken.description: Secret token — pass to io.trustanchor.quicklogin.status to authenticate the poll.

qrCodeUrl.description: Data URL of the QR code image to display.

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp after which the session is expired.
